title: Stop Making Models Bigger, Make Them Behave — Kobie Crawdord, Snorkel
summary: Kobie Crawford demonstrates that a 4B model trained via RL with Snorkel achieved better SQL reasoning than Qwen 3 235B by learning tool discipline, including schema inspection and self-correction. Single-table training transferred to multi-table tasks, improving FinQA from 13.9% to 26.6%, with training cost under $500.
writeup: Kobie Crawford of Snorkel argues that behavior, not parameter count, drives capability, showing a 4B model trained via reinforcement learning to outperform Qwen 3 235B on SQL reasoning. The gains come from learned tool discipline: schema inspection and self-correction rather than raw scale. Single-table training transferred to multi-table tasks, raising FinQA accuracy from 13.9% to 26.6%, with training cost under $500.
